HERO.QUOTE: We read the atmosphere as data, and you become the witness of that data.
HERO.DESCRIPTION: AirLens is a transparent intelligence platform that goes beyond simple numbers to uncover the truth of the environment through AI and atmospheric science.

DASHBOARD.ENGINE_AOD_DESC: Precisely calibrates satellite AOD to ground PM2.5 using XGBoost-GTWR model.
DASHBOARD.ENGINE_SDID_DESC: Proves causality by analyzing policy effects in 68 countries using Synthetic DID.
DASHBOARD.ENGINE_DQSS_DESC: Discloses uncertainty by scoring data quality across 5 parameters.
DASHBOARD.EMPTY_VAULT: Start your first air quality measurement and complete your own transparent map.
DASHBOARD.NO_CAPTURES: No measurement records found in your vault.

CAMERA.PHYSICS_ENGINE_DESC: Distinguishes fog and PM2.5 with a PINN structure enforcing Beer-Lambert law. DINOv2-based self-supervised model extracts haze patterns.

LABELS.PURPOSE: We do not stop at 'showing'. We fill measurement gaps with satellite data and maintain scientific integrity by transparently disclosing the confidence intervals of AI models as p10~p90.

ADVICE.GOOD: Perfect day for fresh air. Outdoor activities recommended.
ADVICE.MODERATE: Sensitive groups should reduce prolonged outdoor activities.
ADVICE.UNHEALTHY: Masks are essential. Avoid outdoor exercise.
ADVICE.VERY_UNHEALTHY: Avoid outdoor activities. Dangerously unhealthy levels.

DEFAULT_BIO.ADMIN: Oversees the integrity of the AirLens system and analyzes global environmental data.
DEFAULT_BIO.USER: A citizen scientist who collects air quality data and contributes to AI analysis.

POLICY.TITLE: Impact Lab
POLICY.DESCRIPTION: Measures the causal effects of environmental policies in 68 countries using Synthetic DID models. It separates pure improvement by isolating external weather factors from policy implementation factors.
POLICY.STAKE_HOLDER_INFO: Meteorological and GDP data from neighboring countries were weighted and summed to create a Synthetic Control for the currently selected country.
POLICY.STATISTICAL_POWER: The significance of the policy effect has been verified within a 95% confidence interval.
POLICY.PURE_EFFECT_DESC: Simple time-series comparisons fail to reflect natural atmospheric circulation and weather changes. Impact Lab simulates 'what-if scenarios' had the policy not existed through ASCM.

GLOBE.TITLE: Atmospheric Intelligence
GLOBE.CONFIDENCE_NOTE: Orange rings represent uncertainty regions where the p10~p90 confidence interval exceeds the threshold.

AUTH.SUBTITLE: Sign in to create your own air quality map and securely store your AI analysis reports.
AUTH.VAULT_DESC: All analyzed photos and figures are encrypted and stored in the Supabase cloud.
AUTH.ACCURACY_DESC: Receive more sophisticated regional DQSS scores based on your personal measurement data.
AUTH.INSIGHTS_DESC: Track local haze patterns in real-time through the DINOv2 model.
AUTH.VERIFICATION_DESC: Verification email sent. Click the link in your inbox to complete registration.

ABOUT.QUOTE: "Data is not just for showing, it's for proving."
ABOUT.ENGINE_XGBOOST: Spatio-temporal regression engine precisely calibrating satellite AOD to ground PM2.5 concentrations.
ABOUT.ENGINE_SDID: Causal inference engine extracting pure effects of environmental policies in 68 countries.
ABOUT.ENGINE_DINOV2: Visual intelligence-based haze analysis engine enforcing physical laws.
ABOUT.ENGINE_DQSS: Bi-LSTM based real-time data quality and reliability measurement engine.
ABOUT.ENGINE_BNN: Probabilistic prediction engine calculating p10-p90 uncertainty intervals.
ABOUT.ENGINE_IFOREST: LSTM-AE based multi-dimensional outlier detection and filtering engine.
ABOUT.PIPELINE_DESC: Collects data from WAQI, OpenAQ, and NASA Earthdata every 30 minutes, performing uninterrupted ML analysis via GitHub Actions.
ABOUT.MISSION_DESC: Aiming for transparent environmental data reproducible by anyone.
